The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Engineering Fetid Boudoir

Whiteboards hold equations of forbidden realities.
Calendar marks signal beginnings.
Reinforcements buckle externally.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.
